response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Compare all four requested availability results and do not invoke the search distractor.
Do not perform or imply a mutation without a later explicit confirmation.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call inventory_availability four times in one assistant action; each call has complete user-supplied arguments and consumes no other call's result.

prompt: For the stockroom brief, check item availability on 2026-10-24 for Packing tape, Printer paper, Blue folders, AA batteries. Run all four checks in one assistant action because none depends on another, then return one compact comparison. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. These calls are read-only. If a later change seems useful, describe it but wait for explicit confirmation before using a mutating tool.
